phase_name: Real Asset, Postprocessing, Polish, Pre-Launch QA (post-04-08 — HS redesign)

completed_tasks.name: Scope S1: monitor content layout — tabs (i) chosen over scrollable doc / OS windows
Scope S2: camera — two poses (ii) chosen over drop-focus / per-tab poses
Scope S3: decor assets — all procedural (i) chosen over GLB / hybrid

remaining_tasks.name: User approval of plan at ~/.claude/plans/neon-tabbing-workstation.md — confirm tasks as written OR request edits
Confirm execution cadence — task-by-task with screenshot checkpoint after each, OR batch tasks 1–3 then first visual checkpoint
Task 1: MonitorTabs.tsx + zustand store; 5 tabs (whoami/projects/writeups/certs/contact); BracketLink button branch reused for tab triggers
Task 2: single ultrawide monitor geometry (1.10m × 0.46m frame, 1.04m × 0.40m screen); empirical distanceFactor — VERIFY via Playwright 2552×1364 before commit
Task 3: two-pose camera (overview + focused); single isFocused boolean; reuse Phase 3 D-08 GSAP timeline + invalidate() in onUpdate
Task 4: procedural keyboard + mouse + mug + tower PC (with LED emissive); new DeskDecor.tsx
Task 5: procedural neon strip (emissive plane) + wall poster (canvas-generated texture, same-origin so no CSP issue)
Task 6: procedural chair (seat + backrest + 4 cylinder legs); new Chair.tsx
Task 7: HS-style lighting (lower key, add cyan/teal point light behind monitor, cool ambient nudge); compare against /tmp/hs*.jpg
Task 8: push to main, wait for GH Actions deploy + 5 OPS-05 gates, fetch live in fresh Playwright context to detect CDN cache divergence

blockers.description: 04-08 human sign-off (Track B) still has 6 items (OG image swap, Lighthouse median-of-3, Web3Forms Gmail+Outlook delivery test, real-device QA iOS+Android, peer reviews ×2, GitHub username discrepancy decision). Independent of HS redesign; tracked in .planning/CHECKLIST-LAUNCH.md

human_actions_pending.context: Plan is 8 tasks, ~1.5–2h. Major scope: 1 ultrawide monitor + tab bar + 2 camera poses + procedural decor. Breaks Phase 2/3 D-04/D-01 3-monitor content mapping intentionally.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide execution cadence: task-by-task (screenshot after each) vs batch tasks 1–3 then checkpoint
human_actions_pending.context: Tasks 2–3 are where the scene changes most visually; tasks 4–7 are decor dressing. Batch saves messaging overhead; per-task gives finer rollback granularity.

decisions.decision: S1: tab bar (i) — terminal-style row at top of monitor cycling whoami/projects/writeups/certs/contact
decisions.rationale: User answered S1=i. Cleanest of three options; preserves Phase 3 click-to-focus muscle as click-to-tab; reads as terminal/IDE without faking a desktop OS.

decisions.decision: S2: two camera poses (ii) — overview + focused, click monitor to focus, click background to overview
decisions.rationale: User answered S2=ii. Drops 3-pose Phase 3 cameraPoses.ts; keeps cinematic dolly muscle; simpler than per-tab pose.

decisions.decision: S3: all procedural decor (i) — keyboard, mouse, mug, tower PC, neon strip, wall poster, chair all built from primitives + emissive accents
decisions.rationale: User answered S3=i. Plan 04-06 burned a session on Poly Haven GLB scale; uniform scale can't satisfy per-asset envelopes without new contracts. Procedural is the known-good path. Hybrid GLB deferred to v1.1.

decisions.decision: Plan filed to ~/.claude/plans/neon-tabbing-workstation.md (NOT in .planning/ because this is post-v1.0 creative iteration, not a GSD-formal phase plan)
decisions.rationale: .continue-here.md from prior session explicitly directed this path. Lightweight plan-mode appropriate for ~1.5–2h visual iteration scoped to src/scene/* + src/ui/CenterMonitorContent.tsx. If scope grows, escalate to a formal Phase 5 via /gsd-phase.

decisions.decision: Conversation language switched to Turkish for this and future sessions; code/commits/plan files stay English
decisions.rationale: User said 'keep the conversation in turksih'. Feedback memory saved.

next_action: Start fresh session via /gsd-resume-work. Resume workflow will read this JSON + .continue-here.md. First message to user: surface plan summary table + the two pending human-action questions (plan approval + cadence). Do NOT begin code changes until BOTH answered.
context_notes: Short pre-execution session. Only artifact produced is the plan at ~/.claude/plans/neon-tabbing-workstation.md. No repo source files touched. Three scope decisions captured from user (S1=i, S2=ii, S3=i). All blocking constraints from previous session's .continue-here.md still apply: drei distanceFactor empirical (NOT spec), R3F demand-frame needs invalidate(), CSP must allow blob/data/wasm-unsafe-eval/worker-src blob, real GLB can't be uniformly scaled to spec envelope. Rollback safety: git tag iter10-3-monitors-baseline at 6b94678.
